titleStmt.title: SII 38.287: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 287. (A.R. No. 287 of 1912.) ŚIVANKŪḌAL, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall, maṇḍapa infront of the same shrine, Śivakoḻunḍīśvara temple.

summary.p: Records that Tāḻaikkuḍaiyāṉ Āḷavandān Puliyūraṉ (a native) of Pūndāḻaikkuḍi in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam made a gift of two thousand four hundred kuḻi of land as tirunāmattukkāṇi after purchase, to the goddess Maragadavalli-nāchchiyār of the Śivakoḻunduḍaiya-nāyaṉār temple at Śivaṉkūḍal in Nīrvēḷūr-nāḍu in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. It is also stated that he purchased this land and a maṭha from Raviyadēvarnallakambar, a mendicant of Tiruvēgambam uḍaiya-nāyaṉār temple at Kāñchīpuram.
Aiyyappan, the village accountant figures as a signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvicaiyakaṇṭa kopālatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 5vatu jayaṅkoṇṭa
coḻamaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkoṭṭattu nirveḷurnāṭṭu civaṉkūṭa(la)luṭaiyār civak
koḻuntuṭaiyanāyaṉārkoyil tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya marakatavallinācciyāṟku coḻama
ṇṭalattu virutarāyapuyaṅkaravaḷaṉāṭṭuRead virutarācapayaṅkaravaḷaṉāṭṭupūntāḻaikkuṭiyil tāḻaikkuṭaiyāṉ Āḷavantāṉ
puliyūraṉeṉ kāñcipurattu tiruvekampamuṭaiyaṉāyaṉārkoyilil kumpiṭṭirukkum Āṇṭārkaḷil Iraviyatevar
nalla kampar maṭappuṟamāy Ivarpakkal nāṉ koṇṭuṭaiyeṉāṉa vatikku teṟkum Ivvaḷakkāṟaṉkālukku kiḻakku te
ṉpāṟkellai tiruccūlatevar Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkiṟa Itukku vaṭakku kiḻpāṟkellai taricukku meṟku nāṟpāṟkellaikku Uṭ
paṭṭa kuḻi Iraṇṭāyirattu nāṉūṟum Ivar maṭamum Iraviyatevar nallakampar pakkale vilaikkuṟak koṇ
ṭu Iṉṉāyaṉārkoyil tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya maratakavilliRead marakatavalli nācciyārkku tirunāmattukkāṇi Ā
ka koṇṭuviṭṭeṉ tāḻaikkuṭaiyāṉ Āḷavantāṉpuliyūraṉeṉ Itu śrīmāheśvararakṣai Ivai Ūrkaṇa
kku Aiyyappar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.287 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
